items.title: Revenue Operations Control Tower Release
items.description: Release of Revenue Operations Control Tower improvements aimed at moving Net New Revenue Attainment and Annual Platform Value Realized, anchored in automation, support deflection, and better operating transparency without creating shadow workflows and led through Unified revenue data model. The quarter concentrates on workflow automation, AI-assisted support deflection, and stronger operating transparency so the work reads like a realistic OKR-driven investment set for a company with roughly 250 product and technology people.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase net new revenue attainment by strengthening unified revenue data model and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.
Increase pipeline quality by strengthening unified revenue data model and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase annual platform value realized by strengthening unified revenue data model and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

productBricks.change: Released Unified revenue data model with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Released Integration adapters and migration toolkit with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Released Rules-based routing engine with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Released Propensity and deal scoring with domain-specific workflow improvements.

deliveryChannels.change: Deployed workflow updates in Revenue Operations Control Tower Web Workspace.
Deployed workflow updates in Revenue Operations Control Tower Dashboard.
Deployed workflow updates in Revenue Operations Control Tower API.

items.title: Support Resolution & Knowledge Hub
items.description: Release of Support Resolution & Knowledge Hub exists to Tighten intake, triage, and guided resolution so support organizations protect retention while lowering resolution drag and avoidable rework. The quarter concentrates on workflow automation, AI-assisted support deflection, and stronger operating transparency so the work reads like a realistic OKR-driven investment set for a company with roughly 250 product and technology people.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase customer retention protected by service by strengthening case intake, triage, and knowledge-assisted resolution workflows and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.
Increase resolution quality by strengthening case intake, triage, and knowledge-assisted resolution workflows and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase annual platform value realized by strengthening case intake, triage, and knowledge-assisted resolution workflows and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

items.title: Employee & Workplace Work Hub Launch Wave
items.description: Initial release focused on giving employees one entry point for tasks, requests, and knowledge-backed status tracking.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase daily active employee users through a clearer starting point for work.
Reduce routine request resolution time by standardizing request and tracking flows.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase annual platform value realized through time saved and tool consolidation.

productBricks.change: Released Employee identity graph for the employee work hub launch wave.
Released Personalized work hub for the employee work hub launch wave.
Released Task inbox and action center for the employee work hub launch wave.
Released Request intake gateway for the employee work hub launch wave.

deliveryChannels.change: Deployed the employee workspace web surface.
Enabled mobile completion for core employee actions.
Exposed employee workflow APIs for connected systems.

items.title: Employee & Workplace Manager Cockpit Rollout
items.description: Release focused on manager approvals, team rhythm, workforce signals, and performance loops in one operating surface.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Reduce approval turnaround through unified manager actions and delegation logic.
Improve capacity coverage with clearer workforce planning signals.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve operating leverage by reducing manager admin drag.

productBricks.change: Released Workforce planning cockpit for the manager operating cockpit rollout.
Released Performance and goal loop for the manager operating cockpit rollout.
Released Learning and skill passport for the manager operating cockpit rollout.
Released Policy-aware approval engine for the manager operating cockpit rollout.

deliveryChannels.change: Rolled out the browser workspace for managers.
Published manager dashboards and planning views.
Updated manager workflow APIs.

items.title: Service, Operations & Finance Flow Control Tower
items.description: Release focused on request standardization, policy-aware approvals, SLA visibility, and exception management for shared services.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase SLA hit rate by improving queue routing and request quality.
Reduce policy exception rate through stronger intake and approval controls.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase enterprise value through lower service cost and rework.

productBricks.change: Released Case and service operations for the service flow control tower.
Released Policy-aware approval engine for the service flow control tower.
Released Spend and expense control for the service flow control tower.
Released Procurement and vendor workflow for the service flow control tower.

deliveryChannels.change: Rolled out the service operations workspace.
Published queue, SLA, and exception dashboards.
Updated service event and approval APIs.

items.title: Product, Technology & Enablement Automation Foundation
items.description: Release focused on reusable workflow design, integration, AI guardrails, and enterprise metric instrumentation.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase automation success rate through standardized platform controls.
Reduce provisioning lead time through better identity-aware automation.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase return on platform investment by raising reuse and lowering custom build cost.

productBricks.change: Released Process automation designer for the automation governance foundation.
Released Integration fabric and workflow bus for the automation governance foundation.
Released AI agent guardrails and audit for the automation governance foundation.
Released Enterprise metric layer for the automation governance foundation.

deliveryChannels.change: Rolled out workflow design and governance workspace.
Published automation reliability and value dashboards.
Exposed platform automation and metrics APIs.

items.title: Service, Operations & Finance Close and Cash Control Wave
items.description: Release focused on invoice matching, reimbursement controls, close visibility, treasury positioning, and scenario-based planning for finance operations.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Reduce finance approval and exception cycle time by tightening spend-to-close control flow.
Reduce policy exception rate by connecting invoice, reimbursement, and close controls.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase enterprise value through lower finance operating cost and better cash and close visibility.

productBricks.change: Released Invoice intake and ap matching for finance control-tower workflows.
Released Reimbursement and card ledger for finance control-tower workflows.
Released General ledger and close cockpit for finance control-tower workflows.
Released Cost planning and allocation analytics for finance control-tower workflows.
Released Treasury and cash positioning for finance control-tower workflows.
Released Financial planning and scenario studio for finance control-tower workflows.

deliveryChannels.change: Rolled out finance operator workspace.
Published close, cash, and planning dashboards.
Exposed finance workflow APIs and event surfaces.
